sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51281" key="i(stw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱστών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱστεών</foreign> (q.v.), <sense id="n51281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weaving-shed</tr_>, Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
